web.geetest_email_verify_desc: To send your verification code, please complete this security check.
web.home_open_via_discord: Open via Discord to get started
web.missing_oauth_params: Missing OAuth parameters. Please try again.
web.select_platform_desc: Choose the platform you want to add an account for
web.add_account_desc: Connect your HoYoverse account to unlock gacha log tracking, daily check-ins, real-time notes, and more — all in one place.
web.add_account_security_cta: Learn how we keep your account safe →
web.select_platform_security_note: We take your account security seriously.
web.login_method_faq_note: Not sure which method to use?
web.select_login_method_desc: Choose how you'd like to authenticate
web.hoyolab_description: Connect your HoYoLAB account to access gacha logs, daily check-ins, and real-time notes for all your HoYoverse games.

email.label: Email & Password
email.desc: Sign in with your email and password

devtools.label: DevTools Cookies
devtools.desc: Extract cookies from browser developer tools

web.email_login_desc: Sign in with your HoYoverse account credentials
web.email_login_panel_desc: Sign in securely with your HoYoverse account email and password. Two-factor authentication and CAPTCHA challenges are handled automatically.
web.email_login_no_account: I don't have a HoYoverse account (login with Google, Facebook)
web.devtools_desc: Follow the steps below to extract your session cookies from your browser's developer tools.
web.devtools_panel_desc: Extract your session cookies directly from your browser's developer tools. Works on both HoYoLAB and Miyoushe — computer only.
web.devtools_step1_desc: Open your browser and navigate to one of the platforms:
web.devtools_step2_desc: Press F12 or Ctrl+Shift+I to open the browser developer tools.
web.devtools_step3_desc: Click on the "Application" tab in the DevTools panel.
web.devtools_step4_desc: In the left panel, click on "Cookies", then click on the current website (e.g. www.hoyolab.com).
web.devtools_step5_desc: Use the filter box to search for "v2" to narrow down the relevant cookies.
web.devtools_step6_desc: Copy each cookie value and paste them into the fields below.
web.devtools_modal_desc: Copy each value from the DevTools Application → Cookies panel and paste below.
web.devtools_security_note: Cookie values are transmitted directly to the HoYoverse API and never stored on our servers. Tokens expire naturally when you log out.
web.email_verify_desc: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email address
web.code_expires_note: Check your inbox — the code expires in a few minutes
web.select_accounts_desc: Choose which game accounts to add to Hoyo Buddy. All accounts are selected by default.
web.default_security_note: Your credentials are never stored on our servers. Authentication tokens are saved locally and used only to communicate with HoYoverse APIs.
